tags.description: While many people believe it to be of Roman origin, in reality, it is not. This aqueduct was constructed by the Alaouite Sultan, Moulay Abdel Aziz, in the early 20th century to supply water to the city of Moulay Idriss Zerhoun from a nearby spring.
